discoveries.existing_patterns: Console.log-based output, SKILLBOOK.md for learnings, sprint memory for loop detection

decisions.decision: Start with npm keywords before TUI - discoverability is highest impact
decisions.reason: npm keywords cost nothing to add and immediately help people find shiplog

decisions.decision: Add simple inline progress display rather than full TUI
decisions.reason: Full TUI (like blessed or ink) adds dependencies and complexity - simple inline updates work well

acceptance_criteria: Keywords cover: agentic coding, claude code, autopilot, long-running, session management, vibe coding
steps: Add comprehensive keyword list to package.json

features.description: Add quick-start code examples to README
acceptance_criteria: Include GIF or terminal recording link placeholder
steps: Add 'See it in action' section with concrete workflow
Add terminal output example showing progress

features.description: Add inline progress display during autopilot
acceptance_criteria: Shows current feature being worked on
steps: Add progress line that updates during session
